Return a compact action plan with system reasoning, network consideration, and edge-AI consideration.
output: 1) Confirm whether the AIS feed and transport path are healthy. 2) Apply edge inference scheduling policy at the edge node first to avoid unnecessary backhaul usage. 3) Because mission requires 95% on-time telemetry delivery, keep the SLM context window small and prefer deterministic prompts. 4) Operationally, reduce generation length to control latency. 5) Emit structured logs for latency, drop rate, and inference confidence so the policy can be migrated to a larger DGX-class platform later.
